title: Aspect Ratio
description: Displays content within a desired ratio.

manual.title: Install dependencies
manual.description: Install the required dependencies for the aspect ratio component.

manual.title: Add utility function
manual.description: Create a cn utility function if you don't have one already.

examples.title: Default
Square
examples.description: A 1:1 square aspect ratio, perfect for profile images or social media posts.

examples.title: Portrait
examples.description: A 3:4 portrait aspect ratio, ideal for vertical images and mobile-first layouts.

examples.title: Widescreen
examples.description: A wider 16:9 layout with increased max-width for cinematic content.

examples.title: Ultrawide
examples.description: A 21:9 ultrawide aspect ratio for panoramic or cinematic imagery.

examples.title: Gallery
examples.description: A gallery grid showcasing multiple aspect ratios side by side.
